data.title: Vitalik: This is no longer the era of Infra, but the era of Applications
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Vitalik Buterin said in an AMA event: "Many people in the blockchain circle would say 10 years ago that the goal of blockchain is to be a global neutral system to protect personal freedom. Now, if a president issues a Memecoin, they will say, wow, this is Real World Adoption, so good, but why does it happen on other chains? If we can be more friendly to those politicians, it will happen on our chain next time! I personally think that such people have gone astray. Of course, they will say that I am too purely idealistic, unrealistic, and so on. Each party has its own story. Some people will also say that the Ethereum ecosystem is too controlled by OGs and there is not enough room for new people to come. But this criticism is in another direction, and different groups have made these arguments. I think there is only one suitable way for us to get out of these predicaments: we need to have some updated stories to explain why Ethereum is, what the ETH coin does, what L1 and L2 do, etc.? Now is not the era of Infra, but the era of Applications, and we need some clear Application Layer We need to re-support this direction and give new people more opportunities to come in.”

data.title: Plasma announces support for Tether stablecoin USD₮0
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Plasma announced on the X platform that USD₮0 will be supported on the first day of the Plasma mainnet launch, allowing Plasma to seamlessly connect with the $141 billion USD₮ on multiple blockchains such as Ethereum, Tron, TON, and Arbitrum. USD₮0 is the core infrastructure of Tether's stablecoin, which aims to provide cross-chain deployment and secure transfer solutions to achieve zero-fee transfers.

data.title: Trump's approval rating slips as Americans worry about economy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A Reuters/Ipsos poll found that U.S. President Trump's approval rating has fallen slightly in recent days as more Americans worry about the direction of the U.S. economy and Trump threatens to impose tariffs on many countries. The six-day poll ended on Tuesday, with 44% of respondents approving of Trump's job, down from 45% in the January 24-26 poll. In the latest poll, the proportion of Americans who disapprove of President Trump's job has risen sharply to 51%, compared with only 41% when he first took office. Trump's immigration policy has received relatively high approval ratings, with 47% of respondents supporting his policies, including his promise to increase the deportation of illegal immigrants. This proportion has not changed much from January. But in the latest survey, the proportion of Americans who think the economy is on the wrong track rose from 43% to 53%. Public support for Trump's economic management has fallen to 39% from 43% previously. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Vitalik: Ethereum is a decentralized ecosystem, not a company
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Vitalik Buterin said: "I think Ethereum is a decentralized ecosystem, not a company. If Ethereum becomes a company, we will lose most of the meaning of Ethereum's existence. Being a company is the role of a company. In fact, there are many large companies in the Ethereum ecosystem: Consensys, various client teams (Nethermind, Nimbus, etc.), Coinbase, L2 teams (including Aztec and Intmax, their privacy technology is very interesting and underestimated by many people). The best way is to find ways to give these companies more opportunities to realize the advantages of the company, and the foundation plays a coordinating role."

data.title: Plasma Mainnet to Support USD₮0 on Launch Day
data.description: According to Foresight News, Plasma's official announcement reveals that USD₮0 will be supported on the first day of the Plasma mainnet launch. This integration will enable seamless connectivity of USD₮0, a core infrastructure of Tether's stablecoin, across multiple blockchains including Ethereum, Tron, TON, and Arbitrum, which collectively hold $141 billion in USD₮. The initiative aims to facilitate cross-chain deployment and secure transfers, offering zero-fee transactions.

data.title: Wormhole is now available on the Monad testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wormhole announced on the X platform that it has launched the Monad test network.

data.title: Switzerland Expands Tax Information Exchange To Include Crypto Assets
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Swiss Federal Council has approved legislation to expand the international automatic exchange of tax information (AEOI) to include new regulations on crypto assets and revisions to the AEOI standards for financial accounts. This expansion is set to take effect on January 1, 2026. As a result, financial institutions will be required to collect and report customer information related to crypto assets.

data.title: Analyst: Whales bought about 430,000 ETH in the past 72 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to data disclosed by crypto analyst Ali Martinez on the X platform, whales bought about 430,000 ETH in the past 72 hours.

data.title: Hashdex gets approval to launch the world’s first XRP spot ETF in Brazil
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Brazilian Securities Commission (CVM) has approved Hashdex to launch the world's first XRP-based spot exchange-traded fund HASHDEX NASDAQ XRP FUNDO DE ÍNDICE in Brazil. Currently, the fund is in the pre-operation stage and is managed by Genial Investimentos. The official listing time has not yet been announced. (Portal do Bitcoin)

data.title: Fold's stock price rose by more than 30% after its listing on Nasdaq
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin reward financial services company Fold Holdings (FLD) successfully listed on Nasdaq on February 19, 2025 through a SPAC merger with FTAC Emerald Acquisition Corp. In the early days of listing, FLD's stock price rose by more than 30%, breaking through $13, but then fell back to about $11.
It is reported that Fold is the latest listed company to hold Bitcoin on its balance sheet, currently holding 1,000 Bitcoins, worth about $96 million. (Coindesk)
